name: Orsu Metals Corporation
summary: Orsu Metals Corporation explores for and develops mineral properties in Russia. The company primarily explores for copper, gold, and molybdenum deposits. It principally holds a 90% interest in the Sergeevskoe gold project that covers an area of 7.6 square kilometers located in the Mogocha District of the Zabaikal'skiy region of Russia. The company was formerly known as European Minerals Corporation and changed its name to Orsu Metals Corporation in June 2008. Orsu Metals Corporation was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Road Town, the British Virgin Islands.
